title: Mayor Walsh Announces Road Reconstruction Project on Peat Street
summary: Mayor Ben Walsh announced a road reconstruction project on Peat Street beginning May 25, 2024, involving milling and paving operations from Burnet Avenue to Erie Boulevard. The road will close daily from 6 a.m. to 6 p.m. for approximately one week, with traffic detours in place and businesses remaining accessible via Erie Boulevard.

political_signal.description: Mayor-led announcement of infrastructure investment demonstrates commitment to roads and bridges maintenance, positioning administration as responsive to citywide asset management.

processing_notes: Sharon F. Owens appears in header navigation context but is not mentioned in article body; title reference is unclear
